forbidden_actions: update state.json / cow-state or the progress ledger
stop_condition: Unit done (report STATUS terminal) or blocked; at most two extra evidence-changing attempts after the first.
human_checks: Only ALLOWED_PATHS changed; the report artifact was written.
Verification was run; zero discovered tests is not reported as success.
No git commit and no workflow-state mutation occurred.
Return is at most eight lines, with no pasted diffs or full logs.
